text:
EQUALS TRUE Careers Page

Careers at EQUALS TRUE

The page lists available job locations across multiple Latin American countries: Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Dominican Republic, Ecuador, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Mexico, Mexico City, Nicaragua, Panama, Paraguay, Peru, and Uruguay.

The organization has open positions in two departments:
- Development - Software
- Graphic Design - UI/UX

A footer note indicates the careers page uses 'Recruiterflow, a candidate tracking system' for their hiring process.
